name: SuperPawn
description_short: SuperPawn at 2707 W Southern Ave, Tempe, AZ 85282 is Mon-Fri 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 3.1 stars across 115 reviews. Call +1 602-438-8468.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn shop chain with more than 3,300 retail locations. The company was founded to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers through a network spanning 29 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). FirstCash is publicly traded and included in both the Standard & Poor's MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index, employing approximately 22,000 people globally.

FirstCash's core business model centers on pawn loans—small, non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property—and retail sales of merchandise. The company buys and sells a wide variety of items including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond traditional pawn lending, FirstCash offers layaway services (10% down payment required), gold and precious metal buying, and retail merchandise sales. Through its subsidiary AFF, the company also provides lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

What distinguishes FirstCash is its massive scale as the dominant international pawn operator with more locations than any competitor, combined with its public company status and inclusion in major indices. The company operates a sophisticated retail network with an online store locator, inventory browsing capabilities, and standardized pawn loan processes across locations. Their integration of AFF's payment solutions platform demonstrates diversification beyond traditional pawn operations into broader consumer finance technology.

For consumers, FirstCash provides quick access to cash through collateral-based lending without credit checks, making it accessible to those with poor or no credit history. However, pawn loans involve surrendering personal property, and interest rates on pawn loans are typically high compared to traditional loans. The company's scale ensures availability in many markets, but loan terms, fees, and merchandise quality may vary by location.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, DC, UK, and Latin America ensures local accessibility
Non-recourse pawn loans require no credit check, making them accessible to credit-constrained consumers
Instant cash payment for items at time of sale (gold, merchandise, pawn collateral)
Wide variety of merchandise bought and sold (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Layaway service available with only 10% down payment for budget-conscious shoppers
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000) providing transparency and financial stability
Online store locator and inventory browsing capabilities for convenience
cons: Pawn loans typically carry high interest rates compared to traditional personal loans or credit options
Borrowers must surrender personal property as collateral, risking loss of items if loans aren't repaid
Loan terms and rates likely vary significantly by location and individual assessment of collateral value
Limited transparency on website regarding specific interest rates, fees, or loan terms before visiting a store
Pawn model incentivizes repeat borrowing cycles, which can trap cash-constrained consumers in high-cost debt
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history who need fast cash without a credit check
People with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools) who can afford to temporarily part with items
Individuals seeking immediate same-day cash who cannot wait for traditional loan approval timelines
Budget shoppers looking for discounted merchandise through retail pawn sales or layaway plans
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable collateral who need immediate funds without a credit check, but they should understand that pawn loans carry high interest rates and risk loss of personal property. The company's massive scale ensures accessibility, but borrowers should compare terms across multiple locations and carefully evaluate whether a pawn loan is preferable to other emergency lending options like credit union PALs or payday alternatives.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying with cash payment on the spot
Retail sales of used and liquidated merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Merchandise buying across wide variety of categories
Store locator and local inventory browsing
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale payment technology solutions through AFF subsidiary
